revision.content:
First held on December 2, 2010, we usually run this workshop early in December each year. ===2013 Workshop=== Activities *Soap molding *Mold making *Woven wrapping paper *Pop up cards *Paper wallets *Fridge magnets *Shopping bags *Santa hats *Purses *Open ended making: **If you see some materials you want to work with and have an idea, then we'll try to help you craft your project! **If you feel like bringing your own materials to include into any of the above crafts, or any crafts you would like to do, we can incorporate that somehow as well. ===Previous Workshop Activities=== ==Molding soap== [[File:Soap.jpg]] *We make our own molds with our vacuum former! ==Shopping bags== [[File:Bags3.jpg]] *[http://www.morsbags.com/get-involved/pattern-download-links/ Make a Mors Bag] ==Denim purse== *[http://sewing.craftgossip.com/tutorial-make-a-purse-from-an-old-pair-of-jeans/2010/02/25/ Instructions] ==Popup cards== *[http://wp.robertsabuda.com/make-your-own-pop-ups/ Robert Sabuda's Popup Cards] *Christmas Tree

[[File:Pop_make_tree_final.jpg]] **[http://wp.robertsabuda.com/pop-make-christmas-tree/ Template] *Stack of gifts[[File:Gift-popup-cards.jpg]] **[http://bloominglabs.org/index.php/File:Popup-presents.pdf Template] ==Paper bows== [[File:DSPBowTutorial_11.jpg]] *[http://www.splitcoaststampers.com/resources/tutorials/dsp_bow/ Paper bow instructions] ==Refrigerator magnets== *[http://www.notmartha.org/tomake/marblemagnets/ Marble magnets instructions] *[http://www.positivelysplendid.com/2011/07/photograph-tiles-from-midwestern-sewing-girl.html Photo tiles instructions] ==Paper wallets== *[http://paper-design.wonderhowto.com/how-to/make-paper-wallet-less-than-two-minutes-124037/ Instructions] ==Gift card holder== *[http://www.countryliving.com/crafts/projects/card-wallets Instructions] ==Woven gift wrap== *[http://makezine.com/projects/woven-trash-gift-wrap/ Instructions] ==Santa hats== *[http://www.wikihow.com/Make-a-Santa-Hat Instructions] [[Category:Workshops]]
